feature.name: IntervalTree core
feature.description: Extract IntervalTree add/remove/overlap/chop operations with Interval value semantics without importing intervaltree.
included_behaviors: add/remove/discard intervals with set semantics and distinct data fields
point and range overlap queries via at/overlap/overlaps
chop trims overhanging intervals and optional datafunc relabeling
self-balancing tree queries through Node search helpers
excluded_behaviors: upstream test harness, benchmarks, and packaging metadata

entanglement.description: IntervalTree couples Interval half-open semantics, SortedDict boundary indexing, and Node rebalancing with overlap/envelop/chop mutation paths.
signals: boundary_table SortedDict keys drive overlap/envelop scans
Node split/merge maintains center and search_point/search_overlap invariants
chop/remove_envelop combine set updates with partial interval trimming
Interval data field distinguishes otherwise identical ranges in the set

output.import: import featurelifted; from featurelifted import Interval, IntervalTree
